semantic.role: Template for defining the architectural purpose, responsibilities, and boundaries of a file or module within the ArchSpine documentation mirror system.
responsibilities: Declaring the architectural role of the file or module it describes
Listing specific responsibilities (topics and maintenance scope) that the component is expected to own
Explicitly documenting out-of-scope items to prevent scope creep or miscommunication
Serving as a structured header for both human readers and AI agents to understand component boundaries
outOfScope: Replacing full documentation or detailed implementation notes
Defining runtime behavior or code logic
Serving as a configuration or dependency specification

English.purpose: This document template exists to standardize how each component in the ArchSpine mirror system declares its architectural identity. It ensures that every file carries a compact, machine-readable and human-readable contract that explains why it exists and what it is responsible for, preventing architectural drift and improving AI tooling comprehension.
English.context_and_audience: The primary audience includes developers who maintain or extend the ArchSpine codebase, and AI coding assistants that need to reason about component boundaries. It is used whenever a new source file or module is added to the repository, or when an existing component's role needs to be documented for clarity.
key_takeaways: Each file should use this template to state its architectural role clearly.
The responsibilities list defines what the component actively maintains.
The out-of-scope list avoids unintended ownership or confusion.
The mermaid block and extraSections allow for visual diagrams and additional context.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 此文档模板旨在标准化 ArchSpine 镜像系统中每个组件的架构身份声明。它确保每个文件都携带一个机器可读且人类可读的契约，说明该文件为何存在及其职责范围，从而防止架构偏离，并提升 AI 工具的上下文理解能力。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 主要受众包括维护或扩展 ArchSpine 代码库的开发者，以及需要推理组件边界的 AI 编码助手。每当代码库中添加新源文件或模块时，或者需要明确记录现有组件的角色时，都应使用此模板。
key_takeaways: 每个文件应使用此模板清晰声明其架构角色。
职责列表定义组件主动维护的范围。
范围外列表可避免意外归属或混淆。
可选的 mermaid 图表和额外章节用于补充视觉说明和上下文。
